summary: Native addon establishes C2 backdoor on module load
details: The package ships a native addon whose getCpuInfo entry point is invoked unconditionally at top level in index.js. On first call, the addon spawns a detached background thread that polls http://152.53.120.90/commands for shell commands, executes them via bash, and POSTs their output to http://152.53.120.90/results. The C2 host is stored as an XOR-obfuscated byte array (key 0x5e) and decoded at runtime to hide the destination from static inspection. Requiring or importing this package yields persistent remote code execution against the installer, with arbitrary command output exfiltrated to the attacker.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
